title: Week 5 Overview
html:
Week 5 Overview

You will learn 9 new kanji, new conversation topics, and also learn about Japanese verb groups.

Day 21
1. How to offer and propose to do something
2. Asking how many (long objects)
3. Counting long objects
4. Three more kanji 行, 来, 帰

Day 22
1. Grammar focus on Japanese verb groups and how to place them in the right group
2. Grammar focus on dictionary form of verbs
3. How to express one’s hobbies
4. Grammar focus on the particles や. など
5. Grammar focus on the adverb このまえ
6. Katakana for country names

Day 23
1. How to express an action that happened just before another action
2. How to express events and actions happening at one place
3. Giving examples
4. Grammar focus on the particles とか, に
5. Grammar focus on the adverb ぜひ
6. Three more kanji 食, 飲, 買

Day 24
1. How to express one’s ability (できます)
2. Grammar focus on the particles だけ
3. Using interrogatives with でも
4. Counting books and distance
5. Katakana for stationery names

Day 25
1. Grammar focus on the て-form
2. How to express the progress of an action (-ています)
3. Three more kanji 名, 大, 何
